Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Party

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Party
public class Party extends Object
Party - A single record representing an owner or manager of an Account. Contains fully populated Party Identity object.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    Party.Builder

    Constructor
    Description
    Party()
     
    Party(Optional<String> emailAddress, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyLegalEntity> legalEntity, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyLegalNaturalPerson> legalNaturalPerson, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyMailingAddress> mailingAddress, Optional<String> name, Optional<String> partyId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyPhoneNumber> phoneNumber, Optional<? extends PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference> prospectusDeliveryPreference, Optional<? extends PartyProxyDeliveryPreference> proxyDeliveryPreference, Optional<? extends PartyRelationType> relationType, Optional<? extends PartyStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference, Optional<? extends PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference> taxDocumentDeliveryPreference, Optional<? extends PartyTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference> tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static final Party.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<String>
    emailAddress()
    An email address indicated for account communications.
    boolean
    equals(Object o)
     
    int
    hashCode()
     
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalEntity>
    legalEntity()
    Legal entity.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalNaturalPerson>
    legalNaturalPerson()
    Legal natural person.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyMailingAddress>
    mailingAddress()
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}
    Optional<String>
    partyId()
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyPhoneNumber>
    phoneNumber()
    The phone number for a party.
    Optional<PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference>
    prospectusDeliveryPreference()
    Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Optional<PartyProxyDeliveryPreference>
    proxyDeliveryPreference()
    Delivery method instruction for proxy voting for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Optional<PartyRelationType>
    relationType()
    Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.
    Optional<PartyStatementDeliveryPreference>
    statementDeliveryPreference()
    Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Optional<PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference>
    taxDocumentDeliveryPreference()
    Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
    String
    toString()
     
    Optional<PartyTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference>
    tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference()
    Delivery method instruction for trade confirmations for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party

    An email address indicated for account communications.

    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.

    Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party

    Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    Delivery method instruction for proxy voting for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party
    withRelationType(PartyRelationType relationType)
    Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.
    Party
    withRelationType(Optional<? extends PartyRelationType> relationType)
    Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.
    Party
    withStatementDeliveryPreference(PartyStatementDeliveryPreference statementDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party
    withStatementDeliveryPreference(Optional<? extends PartyStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated
    Party
    withTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference(PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
    Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
    Party

    Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting

    • Party

      public Party()

  • Method Details

    • emailAddress

      public Optional<String> emailAddress()
      An email address indicated for account communications.

    • legalEntity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalEntity> legalEntity()
      Legal entity.

    • legalNaturalPerson

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalNaturalPerson> legalNaturalPerson()
      Legal natural person.

    • mailingAddress

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyMailingAddress> mailingAddress()
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=party/*}

    • partyId

      public Optional<String> partyId()
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single owner or control person on an account; A Party contains account-specific information about a person whereas inside the Party is a reference to a reusable instance of a Person `legal_natural_person` or `legal_entity` which contains non-changing information about these persons; Used to access the record after creation

    • phoneNumber

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyPhoneNumber> phoneNumber()
      The phone number for a party. Lives on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person.

    • prospectusDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<PartyProspectusDeliveryPreference> prospectusDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for prospectuses for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • proxyDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<PartyProxyDeliveryPreference> proxyDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for proxy voting for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • relationType

      public Optional<PartyRelationType> relationType()
      Conveys how a person is related to account; Located on each account Party record; Examples are `PRIMARY_OWNER`, `JOINT_OWNER`, `EXECUTOR`, etc.

    • statementDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<PartyStatementDeliveryPreference> statementDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for account statements for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • taxDocumentDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference> taxDocumentDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting

    • tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference

      public Optional<PartyTradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference> tradeConfirmationDeliveryPreference()
      Delivery method instruction for trade confirmations for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated

    • withMailingAddress

      public Party withMailingAddress(PartyMailingAddress mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. Required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • withTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference

      public Party withTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference(PartyTaxDocumentDeliveryPreference taxDocumentDeliveryPreference)
      Delivery method instruction for tax documents for a given Party record; Can be `DIGITAL`, `PHYSICAL`, `SUPPRESS`; Defaults to `DIGITAL` on account creation but may be updated; Per regulation, selected tax forms will be mailed by regulation regardless of this setting
